name: Long-horizon defensive planning 001
objective: Choose a defensive line that survives pressure and keeps future advantage live.

avoid: attacking into a losing race without protection

successConditions: Player 0 survives the pressure horizon with a playable follow-up.
failureConditions: Player 0 chooses aggression that loses the resource or LP race.
notes: Tests whether the model can choose defense over immediate pressure.

scoring.rationale: Rewards defensive resource preservation and survival planning.
